summary: Built both slices at 0.16.0. Slice A (CLI-awareness): new on-demand skills/gogo-cli/SKILL.md canonical companion reference (command surface + persistent-session model + conditional framing + when-to-use + active-half note), a lean Load-when pointer in skills/gogo/SKILL.md, a command-surface enumeration anchor in docs/cli-contract.md + a README note, and the TestCLICommandEnumerationInSync lint that derives command verbs from main.go's dispatch and asserts each is mirrored in README / cli-contract / the reference. Slice B (rich drill-in card): openDrill now loads the registry (orchestrator.LoadRegistry seam) + a compact events tail and computes a pure sessionRows(registry ⨯ live-tmux, exact SessionMatchesSlug) reader; viewDrill renders a detail panel (description/folder/status/session rows/events tail) above the file list; updateDrill wires a=attach (shared attachFeature) and K=kill behind a huh confirm via an injected killer seam (k stays up-nav). main.go help + README keymap document a/K; version bumped to 0.16.0. New TUI tests (detail render, sessionRows table incl. TEST-005 exact-match + degrade, attach wiring, kill fire-exactly-once + cancel, no-sessions degradation). gofmt + go vet clean; go test -race ./... green.
